markdown.markdown:
- Schneedorf, J.M. Vivificando Conteúdos Para o Ensino Básico: Moléculas, Gráficos, e Mapas Interativos (Bringing Content to Life for Basic Education: Molecules, Graphs, and Interactive Maps). Ed. Pimenta Cultural, 84p. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M., Rodrigues, K.L. [Basic Biochemistry of People, Animals, and Plants](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.32623.55208). 353p., 2024. ISBN: 978-65-00-90366-9.

- Schneedorf, J.M. [Quantitative Biochemistry](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.36090.40644) & R. 152p., 2022. ISBN: 978-65-00-52125-2. .

- Schneedorf, J.M. [SISMA - Dynamic Visualization in Catalysis & Metabolism](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.25027.92964). 95p., 2022. ISBN: 978-65-00-52124-5.

- Schneedorf, J.M. [Structural Biochemistry: guided by Jmol](http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.29268.10882). 140p., 2019. ISBN 978-85-63-47342-4. Unifal-MG.


## Chapter

- Oliveira, G. A. V.; Lemes, N. H. T.; Sindra, L. V.; Schneedorf, J.M. [Binding of Molecules Followed by Electroanalytical Techniques] (https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-1-0716-4294-8_12). In: Ana Clarissa dos Santos Pires; Luis Henrique Mendes da Silva. (Org.). Methods and Protocols in Food Science - Characterization of Molecular Interactions. 1st ed. New York: Springer Nature, 2025, v. 13, p. 1-12.

- Ferreira, M. P.; Galhardo, B. R.; Lemes, N. H. T.; Coelho, Y. L.; Schneedorf, J.M.; Sindra, L. V. [Application of Quartz Crystal Microbalance to Study Intermolecular Interactions] (https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-1-0716-4294-8_14). In: Ana Clarissa dos Santos Pires; Luis Henrique Mendes da Silva. (Org.). Methods and Protocols in Food Science - Characterization of Molecular Interactions. 1st ed. New York: Springer Nature, 2025, v. 13, p. 29-38.

- Andrade, R. J.; Lemes, N. H. T.; Sindra, L. V.; Schneedorf, J.M. [Difference Spectra Absorption Spectrophotometry Applied to Molecular Interactions] (https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-1-0716-4294-8_12). In: Ana Clarissa dos Santos Pires; Luis Henrique Mendes da Silva. (Org.). Methods and Protocols in Food Science - Characterization of Molecular Interactions. 1st ed. New York: Springer Nature, 2025, v. 13, p. 14-28.
 

- Schneedorf, J.M. JSPlotly - a practical and portable application for interactive graphical simulations for reproducible teaching. In: Open Educational Resources at UNIFAL-MG. Edited by Mafra, L.A.S; Silva, L.E; Schneedorf, J.M. Pimenta Cultural. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Bioquanti: a website for reproducible teaching of codes for content. In: Unifal Interativa: Digital Education Projects at the Federal University of Alfenas. Org: Mafra, L.A.S; Silva, L.E; Schneedorf, J.M. Ed. Pimenta Cultural. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. ScriptRplot - an R script for producing elegant graphics with ggplot2. In: Open Educational Resources at UNIFAL-MG. Org: Mafra, L.A.S; Silva, L.E; Schneedorf, J.M. Ed. Pimenta Cultural. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. R and RStudio: a platform for implementing reproducible teaching. In: Active Learning: from Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M., Nogueira, M.G.F., Mafra, L.A.S., Silva, E.L. Garden of Molecules: a virtual catalog for reproducible teaching of atomic models in basic education. In: Active Learning: from Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. R packages for creating active learning objects in reproducible teaching. In: Active Learning: From Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M., Hornink, G.G. Development of Digital Skills in Higher Education Based on Project-Based Learning with R and Rstudio. In: Active Learning: From Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Silva, L.E., Alves, L.P.O., Vespucio, N.M.B., Schneedorf, J.M. Sisma, an application for simulating dynamic diagrams for teaching and learning and its adaptation to an online environment (SismaWeb). In: Active Learning: From Basic Education to Higher Education. Edited by Sindiany Suelen Caduda dos Santos, Débora Moreira de Oliveira. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Dynamic Documents in Reproducible Teaching with R & Rstudio. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Reproducible teaching as an active methodology in teaching and learning. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M., Rodrigues, B.S., Hornink, G.G. OIER - Interactive Objects in Reproducible Teaching: an approach with R. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Prompt literacy in the production of interactive teaching objects in reproducible teaching for R & RStudio. In: Reflections and Reports on Artificial Intelligence. Edited by Carolei, P., Rosalen, M. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Evaluation of AI assistants in the creation of R codes for interactive objects in reproducible teaching. In: Reflections and Reports on Artificial Intelligence. Edited by Carolei, P., Rosalen, M. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Silva, L.E., Lima, D.C., Isgrignero, I., França, J.G., Lage, R.M., Schneedorf, J.M., Mafra, L.A.S. Tales Ludos: improving the user experience
 
for the development of online educational games. In: Emerging Technologies in Education. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).

- Digital technologies and the co-production of public goods: interactivity and participation in the construction of Open Educational Resources. Mafra, L.A.S, Gozzi, W.P., Santos, A.G.S., Silva, L.E., Schneedorf, J.M. In: Multidisciplinary Approaches to Digital Culture. Org: Costa, C.T.O.P. V & V Editora, Santo André (SP), 2025 (in press).


## Article

- Schneedorf, J.M. JSPlotly: an application for interactive graphics in Biochemistry for HTML viewers. Journal of Biochemistry Teaching. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Living books: a proposal for reproducible teaching with R & Rstudio. Revista Eletrônica Casa de Makunaima. 2025 (in press).

- Schneedorf, J.M. Bioquanti, an interactive website for teaching and learning biochemistry. Journal of Biochemistry Teaching 21.1 (2023): 110-124.

- Oliveira, Schneedorf. A Simple, Fast and Portable Method for Electrochemical Detection of Adenine Released by Ricin Enzymatic Activity. v. 13, p. 238. Toxins. 2021.

- Oliveira, G. A. V.; Schneedorf, J. M. An Electrochemical Approach to Follow and Evaluate the Kinetic Catalysis of Ricin on hsDNA. v. 11(5), p. 405. Life. 2021.

## Patent

- Oliveira, G.A.V., Schneedorf, J.M. Method for the detection of ricin and characterization of its enzymatic activity in real time by electrochemistry. INPI, registration no. BR1020200206532. 2020.

- Cavalcanti, M. H. S.; Virtuoso, L. S.; Mendes, A. A.; Schneedorf, J.M. Process for immobilizing enzymes on magnetic nanoparticle supports. INPI, registration no. BR10202002016.


## Software

- Macedo, J.A.; Matos, N.; Paula, M.M.V.; Silva, L.E.; Schneedorf, J.M. SISMA: Autocatalytic Map System. Computer program. INPI registration no. 08869-3 (May 19, 2008).

- Schneedorf, J.M. JSPlotly & GSPlotly: AI application and code generator for interactive graphics in HTML viewer (2025). Filed on the eduCAPES portal, registration no. 972869.

## Website

- Schneedorf, J.M. Bioquanti (2022). Deposited on the eduCAPES portal, registration no. 748598.

## Customized GPT

- Schneedorf, J.M. GSPlotly: interactive script generator for JSPlotly. Customized OpenAI GPT. Available at: https://chat.openai.com/g/g-6819fbb8d2d08191bf7d50a3dbeadb0d-gsplotly. Accessed on: May 11, 2025.
